value.title: POSCO Completes Korea's Largest EAF to Advance Green Steel
value.summary: PKX completed South Korea's largest electric arc furnace, a key step in its low-carbon steel strategy and 2050 carbon-neutrality goal.

value.title: PKX Teams Up With Hyundai & Others to Develop Advanced EV Motor Steel
value.summary: POSCO expands EV materials efforts with a 10-organization R&D project to develop high-efficiency electrical steel for drive motors.

value.title: PKX Expands Lithium Strategy With U.S. DLE Demo Plant Project
value.summary: POSCO becomes the first Korean company to pursue commercial-scale DLE demonstration in the United States, targeting a 2027 demo plant and 2028 rollout.
